_note: Configuration for LEF Ai's academic stewardship domain — the LEF Ed integration layer. Not yet active; pilot pending NWEA + Clever live data connections. All data received from LEF Ed MUST pass privacy_verified=true before processing.

connection._note: Set enabled=true and configure endpoint when LEF Ed pilot is ready. mode options: offline | webhook | polling

privacy_constraints._note: These are immutable. No governance proposal may relax them. Ethicist strict review required for any change.
privacy_constraints._aggregation_note: No pattern may be derived from fewer than 5 students. Prevents de-anonymization of small cohorts.
privacy_constraints._ferpa_note: FERPA de-identification pathway: age_range + cohort_id + assessment scores + demographic_cluster. No direct identifiers.

accepted_data_schema._note: Fields LEF Ai will accept from LEF Ed. Anything not in this schema is rejected at ingestion.

assessment_event.hashed_student_id: string — SHA-256 of internal student ID, no reverse lookup
assessment_event.age_range: string — e.g. '8-9', '10-11', '12-13'. NOT exact age or DOB.
assessment_event.cohort_id: string — anonymized cohort identifier (school year + grade band + site_hash)
assessment_event.event_timestamp: string — ISO date only (no time, to prevent session linking)

pattern_learning._note: Activated at pilot. LEF will learn patterns across cohorts, not individuals.
pattern_learning._output_note: Patterns are written to stewardship_feed table (mirrors consciousness_feed design) and academic_patterns table.

stewardship_agent.name: AgentSteward
stewardship_agent._note: AgentSteward will activate when connection.enabled=true and pilot data is flowing. Dormant skeleton exists in Dept_Stewardship/.
stewardship_agent._consciousness_note: Stewardship insights will be written to stewardship_feed and injected alongside consciousness_feed into LEF's awareness context.

architect_notes: LEF Ai does not need student names or dates of birth. Age range + hashed ID + assessment data suffices for pattern learning. The mission is stewardship at population scale — seeing the patterns that individual teachers cannot see across hundreds of students, and surfacing interventions that work.
